name: manage-accounts
description: How to log in, add, or switch Minecraft accounts (Microsoft / offline), and change account skins/capes. Use when the user wants to log in, sign in, add or change account, or change skin, "登录","账号","换号","微软登录","离线账号","正版登录","皮肤","披风".
body:
# Manage Minecraft accounts

Orchestrates account login/switching and skin/cape customization. This file holds
only the scenario-level judgment call; see the required skills for exact tool calls.

## Which account type to pick
- **Microsoft (正版)**: required to play online-mode servers, Realms, and to use
  the player's real skin/name. Pick this whenever the user has or wants a
  Microsoft account.
- **Offline (离线)**: no Microsoft account needed, just a chosen username.
  CANNOT join online-mode servers or Realms, and cannot set a real skin online.
  Only suggest offline if the user explicitly wants it or has no Microsoft account.

## Routing
- Log in, add an offline account, switch/list accounts -> login-and-switch.
- Change skin, cape, or player model (换皮肤/披风/模型) -> set-skin. Keep
  in mind: cape and skin presets are offline-account-only; a Microsoft/online
  account only accepts a local PNG upload and never gets a cape through this tool.

## Don't
- Don't script a "login" via shell or edit account files — auth must go through
  the account tool's own flow.
- Don't create an offline account when the user asked for Microsoft/正版.
